tasks.label: Gemini: Smoke test
tasks.command:
$code = @'
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv(".env")
from demo.llm_agent import ChatBot

bot = ChatBot(provider="gemini", model="gemini-3.5-flash")
response = bot.llm.invoke("Reply with only: Gemini OK")
print(bot._to_text(response))
'@; $code | & "${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe" -

tasks.label: Ollama: Smoke test
tasks.command:
$code = @'
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv(".env")
from demo.llm_agent import ChatBot

bot = ChatBot(provider="ollama", model="llama3")
for chunk in bot.generate_message_stream("Reply with only: Ollama OK", [], [], [], "General Chat"):
    print(chunk, end="")
'@; $code | & "${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe" -
